name: Safe synthetic playbook: EDR alert ingestion
description: Generic endpoint detection stub where the platform receives a benignly labeled suspicion from a lab EDR integration. Describes categories and severity only—no shellcode, no memory dumps with secrets.

simulated_timeline.synthetic_narrative: EDR connector posts synthetic alert LAB-SCRIPT-RUNNING to queue.
Analyst workspace loads metadata card (process lineage fixture labels).
IR bridge schedules containment decision checkpoint.

events_emitted.headline: EDR webhook accepted
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Vendor correlation IDs are placeholders; no executable artifacts shipped.

events_emitted.headline: Normalized finding created
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Feeds SecureWatch prioritization matrices in lab mode.

expected_agents_triggered.triggered_reason_synthetic: EDR-grade alert inherits IR orchestration defaults.

expected_remediation.summary: Host isolation recommendation, forensic preservation request simulation, eradication checklist placeholder.

expected_autonomous_remediation.synthetic_action: Auto-enrich alert with asset owner lookup (lab directory stub).

expected_human_approval_gates.synthetic_rationale: SOC lead validates alert is not benign dev tooling noise.

expected_final_report.title: EDR alert — synthetic playbook outcome
expected_final_report.synthetic_executive_summary: Vendor alert bridged into platform workflows; playbook ends with containment checklist and enrichment evidence stubs.
